Standard pricing

2.9% + $0.30 for online card payments

2.7% + $0.05 for in-person card payments

Payments

Domestic cards

2.9% + $0.30 for online card payments

International cards

3.9% + $0.30 for international cards

+ 1% if currency conversion is required

Terminal

Cards and wallets

2.7% + $0.05 per successful charge

Disputes

Dispute received fee

$15.00 for each dispute you receive.
